top3.sql:
SELECT c.name, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN results r ON c.constructorId = r.constructorId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND r.position = '1';

SELECT c.name, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN results r ON c.constructorId = r.constructorId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND r.position = '1';

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND cs.position = '1';

FROM constructors c
JOIN results r ON c.constructorId = r.constructorId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND r.position = '1';

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND cs.position = '1';

final.sql:
SELECT c.name, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN results r ON c.constructorId = r.constructorId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND r.position = '1';
